one_time_description: Remaining deferred revenue for rapid housing development recognized as revenue upon project completion
economic_notes: Band owns interests in aggregates, forestry, pipeline maintenance/construction, revenue sharing joint ventures, farms, resort, and electricity transmission line operations. LNIB Aggregates LP has 50.99% interest in Ogilvie Mountain Holdings LP and Lower Nicola Site Services LP engaged in pipeline maintenance and construction.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not adopted - management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for potential AROs; (2) unable to obtain sufficient audit evidence regarding investment in LNIB Aggregates LP carried at $20,781,463 and related share of net loss of $1,035,768. Comparative figures restated for $1,003,000 revenue accrual error from 2022-2023. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: LNIB Development Corporation and 1374678 B.C. Ltd. Seven GBEs on modified equity basis. Band is located in BC (Merritt area). OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (ISC + CMHC + FNHA + Other Federal + FNESC + Province of BC + BC First Nations Gaming = $20,467,494); OSR = $40,874,027 - $20,467,494 = $20,406,533.
